creator: aduitsis@douitsis.com
text:
Same here, freebsd-update rollback or replacing libcrypto.so.6 with the previous one fixes the problem.

As already reported, backtrace shows the problem being in BN_mod_exp_mont_consttime () from /lib/libcrypto.so.6. Maybe this has something to do with r296462 (https://svnweb.freebsd.org/base?view=revision&revision=296462).
